concept: An AI brain diagram with highlighted layers glowing in different emotion colors — early layers warm for one model, deep layers warm for another, with valence and arousal axes overlaid as coordinates
A resume document with hidden glowing text injections revealed under light, while a hiring AI system ranks candidate cards with one manipulated score flagged as a warning
A balance scale with legal documents on one side and a judge profile card on the other, with a gating mechanism visualized as a neural network layer bridging facts to verdicts
A senior adult speaking to a voice device while a glowing digital twin avatar mirrors their speech patterns on a tablet, with a cognitive health score timeline displayed alongside
A feedback funnel with multilingual comment bubbles flowing in, processed by an AI layer, with emerging topic clusters lighting up as alerts on a service quality dashboard
